violations.text: At the time of inspection, the 3 bay sink used for washing/rinsing/sanitizing of the coffee equipment was observed to be located in the employee bathroom. 3 Bay Sink is to be moved to area outside the bathroom. Coffee sales is to be discontinued until 3 bay sink is moved, inspected, and approved by RIDOH Inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

At the time of inspection, the 3 bay sink used for washing/rinsing/sanitizing of the coffee equipment was observed to be located in the employee bathroom. 3 Bay Sink is to be moved to area outside the bathroom. Coffee sales is to be discontinued until 3 bay sink is moved, inspected, and approved by RIDOH Inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
The walk-in cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair (torn). Per the PIC, gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizer for the sanitizing solution used for the coffee equipment. Per the PIC, test strips are to be obtained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

Walk-in door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Open air cooler was observed with an elevated ambient temperature. PIC put down curtain and ambient temperature dropped 3 degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023
A 3-bay sink is required for the sanitizing the coffee pots. The 3-bay sink must be relocated outside of the bathroom to be able to be used. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023
